summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: PDF Contract Generation, Notifications, Reports, Templates, and StatusTimeline. All 19 backend API tests pass (100%). All frontend features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation works correctly - returns valid PDF (5903 bytes) with proper Content-Type header
Notifications API returns proper structure with notifications array and unread_count
Reports API returns comprehensive statistics including monthly_stats, conversion_rate, and revenue breakdown
Templates API (packages and proposals) returns seeded data and allows CRUD operations
StatusTimeline component shows compact (X/6) progress indicator on dashboard form cards
NotificationBell component shows bell icon in header with dropdown functionality
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed packages and templates created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (PDF generation, notifications, reports, templates, status timeline) are fully functional. Test proposal with access_token 7e9465b4-fa2d-4ba9-8baf-05e5d32cd971 has a signed agreement - PDF contract can be generated via GET /api/public/contracts/{access_token}/pdf. Templates page has seeded certification packages (QMS, EMS, OHS, IMS, Food Safety, Info Security) and proposal templates (Large, Small, Standard pricing).

notifications.ui_component: NotificationBell renders in header with dropdown

reports.ui_page: ReportsPage shows 4 summary cards, revenue breakdown, proposal stats, monthly chart

templates.ui_page: TemplatesPage shows packages and templates in grid with tabs

status_timeline.compact_view: Shows (X/6) indicator on dashboard form cards
status_timeline.full_view: 6-step stepper shown in form detail modal

mocked_integrations.email_sending: MOCKED - Email sending logs to console instead of sending real emails (SMTP not configured)
